title: tecoma radicans var. thunbergii
intro: Tecoma radicans var. thunbergii, also known as Yellow Trumpet Vine, is a flowering vine native to Japan and Korea, characterized by its bright yellow trumpet-shaped flowers and twining habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tecoma radicans var. thunbergii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
